title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: Video outlines five production deployment patterns for AI agents in TypeScript: streaming tool events for responsive UIs, layered authentication (OAuth with API Gateway and IAM), type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost controls and model routing, and observability via metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing. Patterns apply across platforms though demonstrated on AWS infrastructure.
